# rogue-hunter command wire format. Generated by command_bytes.rs; do not hand-edit.
# A diff here renumbers existing share codes. See the module docs.
Direction::North = 00
Direction::NorthEast = 01
Direction::East = 02
Direction::SouthEast = 03
Direction::South = 04
Direction::SouthWest = 05
Direction::West = 06
Direction::NorthWest = 07
Command::Move = 0000
Command::Wait = 01
Command::Melee = 020007
Command::Ranged = 03010301
Command::Manoeuvre = 040361696d020205
Command::Signature = 05097365742d736e6172650106010001
Command::UseDraught = 06
Command::UseBindingCharm = 070002
Command::Interact = 080b
Command::Talk = 0904
Command::BuyShot = 0a05
Command::Travel = 0b
Command::Craft = 0c0d73696c7665722d62756c6c6574
Command::Consecrate = 0d
Command::OpenGrave = 0e09
Command::Force = 0f03
Command::UncoverVillain = 10
